markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[6-month checkpoint meeting between Arena and GrowthX to review SEO program performance and discuss next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic to Arena's site from GrowthX content has been increasing, but conversions remain flat](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [There's misalignment on success metrics and expectations for the SEO program](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Strategic discussions and alignment on goals/metrics are needed, rather than just focusing on content production](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Questions raised about quality of traffic and how to measure true impact beyond just visitor numbers](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### SEO Program Performance Review

  - [GrowthX reports traffic to Arena site from their content has been increasing (250+ weekly visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)
  - [Arena sees flat overall website traffic (\~2.5-3.2k visitors) and no increase in conversions](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=2455.0)
  - [Discrepancy in traffic data between Google Analytics and Search Console noted](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=2680.0)
  - [Debate over quality of traffic and how to measure true business impact](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Expectations and Success Metrics

  - [Original goals included increasing traffic and conversions/signups](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Misalignment on what constitutes success - traffic increase vs. conversions](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [Need to revisit and clarify success metrics and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)

### Strategic Approach

  - [Weekly calls focused on content production, lacking strategic discussions](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [GrowthX team suggests need to understand Arena's "aha moment" and how to translate that to website](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Potential to apply learnings from Arena's successful outbound efforts to digital/website strategy](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=3268.0)

### Program Structure and Communication

  - [Arena felt lack of strategic guidance and involvement from Marcel (GrowthX founder)](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [GrowthX explained their team structure and Marcel's indirect involvement](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=3511.0)
  - [Acknowledged need for better alignment and communication](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=3525.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Marcel to discuss program strategy and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=3535.0)
  - [Revisit and clarify success metrics for the SEO program](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)
  - [Explore how to better measure quality of traffic and true business impact](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Discuss potential pivots or changes to program focus (e.g. CRO, applying outbound learnings)](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=3184.0)
  - [Determine whether to continue engagement through February or end sooner](https://fathom.video/share/TQQMiF9HfgEByaqLLxFt7sNY2r4SRWsV?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
